nav.searchNoSuggestions: No suggestions yet. Press Enter to search manuscripts.
nav.siteTagline: Scottish Charters and the Emergence of Government, 1100–1250

footer.about: Scottish Charters and the Emergence of Government, 1100–1250. A resource for the study of the contents, script and physical appearance of the corpus of Scottish charters.
footer.funded: Funded by the Arts and Humanities Research Council (AHRC).
footer.copyright: ©2015–17 Models of Authority. Some parts available under CC-BY licence. All manuscript images are copyright of their respective repositories. Website by DDH / KDL. Built with Archetype.

landing.historicalContextLink: Read more about the historical context

intro.charterManuscriptsDesc: Browse and search the corpus of surviving Scottish charters from the twelfth and thirteenth centuries.
intro.scribalHandsDesc: Explore the handwriting of the scribes who wrote these charters and trace connections between documents.
intro.historicalContextDesc: Understand how charters shaped the emergence of government in medieval Scotland.

manager.starredSavedTo: New starred items are saved to {name}.

manager.renameDesc: Change the name of the active collection.
manager.duplicateDesc: Copy the active collection and its saved items into a new collection.
manager.deleteDesc: This removes the collection and its saved items from this browser. It does not delete images or graphs from the site.

help.title: Lightbox Help
help.description: Toolbar actions, tools, and keyboard shortcuts.
help.tip1: Click an image to select it. Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple.
help.tip2: Drag images to reposition them on the canvas.
help.tip3: Use the corner handles on a selected image to resize it.
help.tip4: Open the Adjust dropdown to change opacity, brightness, contrast, and grayscale.
help.tip5: Double-click empty canvas space to create a sticky note.
help.rotateDesc: Rotate the selected image(s) clockwise by 90 degrees.
help.bringToFrontDesc: Move the selected image(s) above all others.
help.moveUpDesc: Move the selected image(s) one layer up.
help.moveDownDesc: Move the selected image(s) one layer down.
help.sendToBackDesc: Move the selected image(s) behind all others.
help.cropDesc: Draw a rectangle on the selected image and save the cropped region.
help.measurementDesc: Measure pixel distances between two points on the canvas.
help.annotationsDesc: Toggle annotation mode on the selected image. Draw rectangles or freehand shapes to annotate regions.
help.stickyNoteDesc: Add a draggable note to the workspace. You can also double-click empty space on the canvas.
help.toggleGridHelpDesc: Show or hide a grid overlay on the canvas for alignment.
help.minimapDesc: Show a small overview map of the entire workspace with a viewport indicator.
help.compareImagesDesc: Open side-by-side or overlay comparison for two selected images. Zoom and pan are synchronized by default.
help.compareRegionsDesc: Compare cropped regions from different images side-by-side or overlaid.
help.importDesc: Import a workspace from a JSON or TEI XML file.
help.saveSessionDesc: Save the current workspace state as a named session you can restore later.
help.exportDesc: Export the workspace or selected images as PDF, JPEG, structured JSON, or TEI XML.

searchEngine.title: Search Engine
searchEngine.subtitle: Manage Meilisearch indexes for the public site
searchEngine.globalActionsDesc: Operate on all 9 indexes at once.
searchEngine.outOfSync: {count, plural, =1 {1 index out of sync} other {{count} indexes out of sync}}
searchEngine.tasksRunning: {count, plural, =1 {1 task running} other {{count} tasks running}}
searchEngine.cannotConnectDesc: Check that the Meilisearch service is running and accessible.
searchEngine.confirmClearDesc: This will remove all {count} documents from the {label} index. Search results for this type will be empty until reindexed.
searchEngine.confirmCleanReindexDesc: This will clear and then rebuild the {label} index from {count} database records.
searchEngine.confirmReindexAllDesc: This will reindex all 9 search indexes from the database. Existing data will be updated in place.
searchEngine.confirmClearRebuildAllDesc: This will delete ALL documents from ALL indexes, then rebuild from scratch. Search will be temporarily unavailable. This cannot be undone.
searchEngine.taskCeleryHint: Task is still pending. Is the Celery worker running?
searchEngine.taskCeleryHint2: Task is still pending. Make sure the Celery worker is running.

translations.title: Translations
translations.subtitle: Manage domain-specific labels used across the site.
translations.sectionLabelsDesc: These labels now live in the frontend and replace backend app/model/field display settings.
translations.sectionSearchDesc: Rename the category tabs on the public search page (e.g. "Manuscripts" → "Corpus"). The Manuscripts tab follows the "App Name: Manuscripts" label above.
